Beefy Stakes # Beefy Stakes: Yard Sign Accessories ![Beefy Stakes](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/0418e7b8-2cf8-4d6e-addf-0f6b66e501f4.jpg) Product: Beefy Stakes Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) [Add to Cart](javascript:__doPostBack\('ctl00$ctl00$ctl00$MainBody$MainBody$MainContent$Loader$ctl01$ctl00$AddProductToCart',''\)) * [Product Overview](#85456174-111d-40e4-b3fe-15f13c62f7e1) #### [Product Description](#product-descriptionCollapse) #### Beefy Stakes Beefy stakes are a sturdy way to hold [yard signs](https://www.banners.com/yard-signs "Yard Signs"). You will need at least 2 beefy stakes per yard signs, while larger signs may require more stakes. The beefy stakes are 27 inches, and the sign will be 15 inches off the ground. #### [Payment](#paymentCollapse) All banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.](https://www.banners.com/resources/online-orders-pay-with-check). We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order. #### [Shipping](#shippingCollapse) #### [General Shipping Guidelines](#general-shipping-guidelinesCollapse) If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States. **You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.** Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders. After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package. Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent. Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after initial scheduled delivery. **International shipping Notes:** For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team. #### [Shipping Maps](#shipping-mapsCollapse) **Beefy Stakes** This product is made in our Minnesota facility only. ![US Shipping Map](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Shipping-Map_Minnesota-0714.jpg) #### [Shipping Methods](#shipping-methodsCollapse) We offer the following shipping methods: \*\*\* Orders received after 5pm CST will be processed the following business day. \*\*\* Standard ( 3–5 Business Days ) Three Day ( 3 Business Days ) Two Day ( 2 Business Days ) Overnight ( 1 Business Day ) UPS Overnight AM **Economy Shipping** If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box i
